QA-02 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec tutor search no filters navigates
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa02_ec_tutor_search_no_filters_navigates 🕐 2026-05-29 22:40:05 ⏱ 1.21s
📋 What this test was checking
EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use the search field on the page
  3. Click the navigation link being tested
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
EC-M-17: Find a Teacher with no filters must navigate to find-tutors.
✗ What actually happened
EC-M-17: No-filter search did not navigate to find-tutors: https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)

QA-02 -002 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa02 ec phone boundary lengths
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa02_ec_phone_boundary_lengths 🕐 2026-05-29 22:40:05 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing. Default country is +966 Saudi Arabia which expects ~9 digits. Other lengths may legitimately disable Send Code as a validation signal — that is correct behavior, not a bug. We verify the form remains responsive and the input was accepted; we do NOT assert Send Code becomes enabled at every length — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: 7, min, 7, digits.
🧪 Test data used
params: [7, min, 7, digits]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Enter a phone number in the WhatsApp number field
  3. Use these parameters: 7, min, 7, digits
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Phone numbers at boundary lengths: form must accept the input without crashing.
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
